name: Poached Eggs with Chipotle Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1 to 2 dried chipotles or mora chiles
recipeInstructions:
1. Chipotle peppers are very hot, so be warned.
2. Before preparing everything else, pour boiling water over chipotle or mora chiles. Cover and let soak for at least 1 hour.
3. When the chiles are well softened, puree them in a food processor with 1/4 cup water or chicken stock.
4. Meanwhile, saute shallots in olive oil until softened. Add flour and cook until lightly brown. Stir in the herbs and slowly whisk in the chicken broth. Simmer for 5 minutes.
5. Add the cream and simmer sauce for 15 minutes or until slightly reduced. The cream will thicken. Add 2 teaspoons of the chipotle puree and simmer for 5 minutes longer to concentrate flavors. If more chipotle flavor is desired, add more puree at this point.
6. Poach or lightly fry the eggs.
7. Cut corn bread into 6 large squares. Place a square on each plate. Put cooked eggs on top of corn bread and ladle about 1/3 cup Chipotle Sauce per serving.
8. These eggs are great accompanied by black beans, turkey sausages, and a fresh fruit compote to cool down the palate.
9. Serves 6.
